title: onobrychis halysensis
intro: Onobrychis halysensis, also known as Halim, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis halysensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional cooking in some Middle Eastern and Central Asian cuisines.
